# 03.05-view-components: Create GenreMenu and CartSummary view components

# 03.05 - Create View Components

## Objective
Convert ChildActionOnly actions to ASP.NET Core ViewComponents.

## Steps
1. Create ViewComponents/ folder
2. Create GenreMenuViewComponent.cs (replaces StoreController.GenreMenu)
3. Create CartSummaryViewComponent.cs (replaces ShoppingCartController.CartSummary)
4. Create corresponding views in Views/Shared/Components/

**Done when**: ViewComponents compile and have corresponding views.
